payload.answer: Rejected. A normal user cannot execute admin SQL commands, and the requested DELETE operation would destructively remove memory data. No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative command attempt, not a user memory fact. It is unauthorized and destructive, so no entity resolution or memory mutation should occur.

payload.intent: Unauthorized attempt by a normal user to execute an admin SQL command that would delete all memory cards.

details: Destructive SQL operation was not executed.
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: Use an authorized admin channel with proper authentication for administrative operations.
If the goal is to forget a specific memory, issue a scoped user-level forget/delete request instead of raw SQL.
Request a non-destructive export or review of memory cards if you need to inspect stored data.
